story.text:
# 💡 C83 · Compositional Leakage Amplification
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Policy-only separation compounds toward (2^N−1)ε with chain depth; amnesia separation breaks the Markov chain and caps at Nε — exponential-to-linear. Edge C7 → C83 → C17. Active (55% · Run 2).
